northStar: Every executable Kumo component is a native, package-backed Vue, Svelte, and Solid implementation that is visually and behaviorally indistinguishable from canonical @cloudflare/kumo@2.5.2 React for the same fixture and state.

gates.definition: One shared canonical fixture plan selects contract vectors, props, content, and states for all four frameworks. No component page, homepage, runtime, test, or gallery owns a second fixture definition.
gates.pass: All 41 framework quartets expose the same nonempty fixture digest and architecture tests reject independent fixture maps or stale native runtime routes.

gates.definition: Canonical React computed presentation is captured as framework-neutral visual IR: semantic parts, DOM geometry, classes/tokens, typography, color, borders, radii, spacing, icons, responsive behavior, and state attributes.
gates.pass: Every native emitter and package stylesheet is generated from that visual IR; no gallery CSS draws or repairs component internals.

gates.definition: For every canonical observable fixture state and viewport, Vue, Svelte, and Solid screenshots are compared with canonical React in one pinned Chrome/font/environment.
gates.pass: Zero unmasked differing pixels for all required screenshot cells. Only deterministic browser chrome/caret/animation regions may be declared in the shared visual contract; no component-specific pixel allowlists.

gates.definition: Trusted browser input executes every canonical observable vector against exact packed packages through SSR and hydration.
gates.pass: React, Vue, Svelte, and Solid each pass 124/124 vectors with matching state, focus, events, accessibility, and node-identity observations.

gates.definition: A consumer gets the correct component by installing the package and package CSS only.
gates.pass: The homepage and component pages remove component-specific repair CSS; exact tarball consumer screenshots still pass pixel parity.

gates.definition: Every homepage card, component page, docs page, example, package asset, and framework tab works locally.
gates.pass: All-41 page audit, demo audit, link/asset smoke, responsive overflow checks, and interaction journeys pass twice with zero unfiltered console, hydration, network, or HTTP diagnostics.

gates.definition: The exact current-source release is reproducible.
gates.pass: Two clean detached Node 22/npm 11 release runs produce identical package, gallery, docs, deploy, and receipt hashes.

gates.definition: The exact release-proven revision and payload are deployed and publicly usable.
gates.pass: Clean deploy succeeds; production identity matches the committed revision and payload; the full pixel, behavior, route, PWA, SEO, artifact, and diagnostics proof passes twice.

gates.definition: Progress and terminal claims are computed from current immutable receipts only.
gates.pass: Every gate above is passed, no receipt is stale, progress is complete, and a new terminal receipt binds source commit, deployed commit, payload, package hashes, visual matrix, behavioral matrix, and two production runs.

hardFailures: Any hand-written lookalike, copied final HTML, downstream React wrapper, innerHTML/@html reconstruction, post-mount DOM reconstruction, hidden exception, filtered diagnostic, fabricated metric, skipped executable component, component-specific pixel allowlist, suppressHydrationWarning, or gallery-owned component styling.
Any visible mismatch that a human can identify but the automated visual gate accepts.
Any claim of complete before current-source production proof passes twice.
loopStopCondition: Stop only when every gate is passed by current-source receipts, the full test/release/deploy/production sequence is green, the worktree contains only protected unrelated modifications, all intended changes are committed, and workflow/fully-done.json is satisfied without exception.
